    returns the ElasticsearchPersistentProperty with the given fieldName (can be set by the Field) annotation.

    default ElasticsearchPersistentProperty
    ElasticsearchPersistentEntity.getRequiredSeqNoPrimaryTermProperty()
    Returns the SeqNoPrimaryTerm property of the ElasticsearchPersistentEntity or throws an IllegalStateException in case no such property is available on the entity.
